pi_items.source: Task description specifies exact mood names in task.json
Downloaded and queried Chinook database: Rock=1297 tracks + Jazz=130 tracks = 1427 total trackable rows
Task description states: 'tag all Rock tracks as Energetic (MoodId=1)' and Energetic is assigned ID=1
Task description states: 'tag all Jazz tracks as Focus (MoodId=2)' and Focus is assigned ID=2
Downloaded Chinook database (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) and queried Track table: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track t JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId=g.GenreId WHERE g.Name='Rock'
Downloaded Chinook database (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) and queried Track table: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track t JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId=g.GenreId WHERE g.Name='Jazz'

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real Chinook database (downloaded from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) which contains 1297 Rock tracks and 130 Jazz tracks (1427 total). The task requires creating a Mood table with three mood entries (Energetic=ID1, Focus=ID2, Melancholy=ID3) and a TrackMood junction table with composite primary key. All metadata values are correct: min_junction_rows=1000 is a conservative minimum (actual would be 1427), expected_rock_mood_id=1 and expected_jazz_mood_id=2 match the task specification.
